title: Vote for proposals
description: Your neurons mint rewards by participating in governance. You can vote yourself or delegate voting to a known neuron.

noFollowing.title: No known neuron selected
noFollowing.body: Following a known neuron automates voting on proposals and helps ensure your neuron mints voting rewards.

proposals.cta: Curious about what's being voted on?

warnings.stakeRequired: You need at least one neuron to follow a known neuron. Please lock ICP first.
warnings.followingMismatch: Your neurons follow multiple known neurons across different topics, so a single known neuron card can't be shown yet.

errors.loadFollowing: Unable to load following data. Please try refreshing the page.
